sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109820" key="u(fedri/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑφεδρ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n109820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a sitting under, lower seat,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προεδρία,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
